model: cumulative-logit OrdinalGEE with exchangeable within-rater correlation
outcome_construction: risk was quality-aligned; text-equivalent questionnaire placements were averaged within participant and then rounded to the nearest integer category
release_packaging_note: Absolute local paths and credential/payload-shaped fields were sanitized. See manifests/source_to_release_map.csv for source and release hashes.
reporting_reason: retain the attempt audit only; no coefficient is reportable when the iteration-limit/finite-inference stability criteria fail
role: model-form sensitivity only; not primary inference

waves.cluster_count_warning: robust GEE covariance is fragile with fewer than 30 rater clusters
waves.failure_interpretation: not usable as a stable model-form check because convergence or finite-inference criteria failed
warnings: Iteration limit reached prior to convergence

waves.formula: human_score_ordinal ~ api_z + C(domain) + C(task) + C(dimension) + C(selection_role)
